testcase.name: test_while_basic
testcase.failure: ../phase_05/tests/test_control_flow.py:35: in test_while_basic assert run(src) == "10\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:89: in evaluate_statement self.environment.define(stmt.name, value) tinylang/environment.py:11: in define raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Redeclaration of '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Redeclaration of 'sum'

testcase.name: test_keys_values_has_del
testcase.failure: ../phase_09/tests/test_dicts.py:45: in test_keys_values_has_del assert run(src) == expected ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'keys'

testcase.name: test_for_over_list_one_var
testcase.failure:
../phase_09/tests/test_dicts.py:53: in test_for_over_list_one_var assert run(src) == "10
20
30
" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:141: in evaluate_statement if len(stmt.iterators) == 1: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ForStmt' object has no attribute 'iterators'

testcase.name: test_for_over_list_enumerate
testcase.failure:
../phase_09/tests/test_dicts.py:61: in test_for_over_list_enumerate assert run(src) == "0 10
1 20
2 30
" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:141: in evaluate_statement if len(stmt.iterators) == 1: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ForStmt' object has no attribute 'iterators'

testcase.name: test_for_over_dict
testcase.failure: ../phase_09/tests/test_dicts.py:69: in test_for_over_dict assert run(src) == "a 1\nb 2\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:125: in evaluate_statement if len(stmt.iterators) == 1: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ForStmt' object has no attribute 'iterators'

testcase.name: test_for_break_continue
testcase.failure: ../phase_09/tests/test_dicts.py:81: in test_for_break_continue assert run(src) == "1\n3\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:141: in evaluate_statement if len(stmt.iterators) == 1: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ForStmt' object has no attribute 'iterators'

testcase.name: test_lex_error_is_typed

failure.message: Exception: Unrecognized character '@' at line 1, col 9

testcase.failure: ../phase_10/tests/test_errors.py:23: in test_lex_error_is_typed tokenize("let x = @;") tinylang/lexer.py:158: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unrecognized character '{char}' at line {line}, col {col}") E Exception: Unrecognized character '@' at line 1, col 9

testcase.name: test_runtime_error_is_typed_and_has_line

failure.message: assert None is not None + where None = TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'").line + where TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'") = <ExceptionInfo TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'") tblen=10>.value

testcase.failure: ../phase_10/tests/test_errors.py:40: in test_runtime_error_is_typed_and_has_line assert exc.value.line is not None # parser tracked line/col on Identifier or Call ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert None is not None E + where None = TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'").line E + where TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'") = <ExceptionInfo TinyRuntimeError("Undefined variable 'missing_var'") tblen=10>.value

testcase.name: test_runtime_error_stack_includes_function_names
testcase.failure: ../phase_10/tests/test_errors.py:56: in test_runtime_error_stack_includes_function_names assert "f" in names and "g" in names and "h" in names E AssertionError: assert ('f' in [])

testcase.name: test_division_by_zero_is_runtime_error_typed
testcase.failure: ../phase_10/tests/test_errors.py:76: in test_division_by_zero_is_runtime_error_typed run("print(1 / 0);") tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:196: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_binary_op(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:268: in evaluate_binary_op raise Exception("Division by zero") E Exception: Division by zero

testcase.name: test_len_of_list
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:32: in test_len_of_list assert run("print(len([1, 2, 3, 4]));") == "4\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'len'

testcase.name: test_push_appends_and_mutates
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:43: in test_push_appends_and_mutates assert run(src) == "[1, 2, 3]\n3\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_pop_returns_and_shrinks
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:53: in test_pop_returns_and_shrinks assert run(src) == "30\n[10, 20]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'pop'

testcase.name: test_list_passed_to_fn_mutates_caller_view
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:78: in test_list_passed_to_fn_mutates_caller_view assert run(src) == "[1, 1]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_range1_basic
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:5: in test_range1_basic assert run("print(range1(5));") == "[0, 1, 2, 3, 4]\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:160: in evaluate_statement raise _ReturnSignal(self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_range_two_args
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:9: in test_range_two_args assert run("print(range(2, 6));") == "[2, 3, 4, 5]\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_map_double
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:18: in test_map_double assert run(src) == "[0, 2, 4, 6]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:160: in evaluate_statement raise _ReturnSignal(self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_filter_evens
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:27: in test_filter_evens assert run(src) == "[0, 2, 4, 6]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:160: in evaluate_statement raise _ReturnSignal(self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_reduce_sum
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:35: in test_reduce_sum assert run(src) == "10\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:160: in evaluate_statement raise _ReturnSignal(self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:39: in test_sum_builtin_in_stdlib assert run("print(sum(range1(5)));") == "10\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:340: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'

testcase.name: test_contains
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:48: in test_contains assert run(src) == "true\nfalse\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:141: in evaluate_statement if len(stmt.iterators) == 1: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ForStmt' object has no attribute 'iterators'

testcase.name: test_reverse
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:52: in test_reverse assert run("print(reverse([1, 2, 3]));") == "[3, 2, 1]\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:326: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate_expr(arg) for arg in expr.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'len'

testcase.name: test_composing_stdlib
testcase.failure: ../phase_11/tests/test_stdlib.py:67: in test_composing_stdlib assert run(src) == "40\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:377: in run evaluator.run_with_stdlib(source, default_stdlib) tinylang/evaluator.py:77: in run_with_stdlib self.run(source) tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in run self.evaluate_program(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:82: in evaluate_program self.evaluate_statement(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:88: in evaluate_statement value = self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:160: in evaluate_statement raise _ReturnSignal(self.evaluate_expr(stmt.value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:353: in evaluate_call self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:105: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(stmt.body) tinylang/evaluator.py:94: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_statement(s) tinylang/evaluator.py:86: in evaluate_statement self.evaluate_expr(stmt.expr) tinylang/evaluator.py:200: in evaluate_expr return self.evaluate_call(expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:336: in evaluate_call callee_val = self.evaluate_expr(expr.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:202: in evaluate_expr return self.environment.get(expr.name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:27: in get return self.parent.get(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/environment.py:28: in get raise TinyRuntimeError(f"Undefined variable '{name}'") E tinylang.errors.TinyRuntimeError: Undefined variable 'push'
